name: Chopped Olive & Cheese Canapes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green olives with pimentos, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped green and black olives, mayonnaise, grated Parmesan cheese, and Tobasco sauce in a bowl until well combined.
2. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Remove crusts from white bread slices.
4. Cut the remaining bread slices into diamond or round shapes.
5. Toast one side of each bread slice for 1-2 minutes, or until lightly golden.
6. Dip the unbaked side of each bread slice in the melted garlic butter.
7. Spread the olive mixture onto the buttered side of each bread slice.
8. Top each piece with a sliced green olive, if desired.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes, or until bubbly and lightly golden.
The canapes can also be formed into mini-quiches by:
1. Cutting pie crust pastry into round shapes and placing them in a muffin tin lined with parchment paper.
2. Brush the unbaked side of each pastry shell with a small amount of melted garlic butter (do not overdo it).
3. Fill each pastry shell with the olive mixture.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until bubbly, about 15-20 minutes.
